title: Savory Flaky Portuguese Cod Fritters
description: A briny and comforting Portuguese dish featuring cod, stilton cheese, and a flaky texture, made paleo-friendly by using paleo-friendly ingredients and deep-frying to a crispy golden brown.
instructions: Cut the cod fillets into small pieces and set aside.
In a large bowl, combine the almond flour, eggs, coconut milk, paleo-friendly seasoning blend, salt, and black pepper, and mix well.
Add the crumbled stilton cheese to the bowl and mix until just combined.
Add the cod pieces to the bowl and mix until they are fully coated with the cheese and flour mixture.
Heat the coconut oil in a deep frying pan to 350 degrees.
Using a spoon, drop small balls of the cod mixture into the hot oil and fry until golden brown, about 3-4 minutes.
Remove the fritters from the oil with a slotted spoon and drain on paper towels.
Serve the fritters hot and enjoy.
